title: Naujawan
actors: Nalini Jaywant, Premnath Malhotra, Nawab Kashmiri
plot: Kamla's father wants her married off to a wealthy suitor, which he finds in Kishore, who is interested in the marriage just to be able to usurp Kamla's wealth. However, Kamla doesn't want to marry Kishore. To avoid this mismatch, ...
